name: SF Data 360
description: Data Cloud/Data 360 direct REST helper — d360_api, compact d360_metadata discovery, d360_probe, and extension-owned progressive-disclosure skill references

docs.summary: Direct Data 360 REST access through sf api request rest with API-version pinning, target-org resolution, dry-run, safety confirmation, compact metadata helpers, and progressive skill references.
safety: No MCP runtime or Java subprocess is used.
Mutating calls are classified by method/path and confirmed when required.
The sf-data360 skill is contributed only while the extension is enabled.
